headline: NOBEL LAUREATE JOHN JUMPER LEAVES GOOGLE DEEPMIND FOR ANTHROPIC — ALPHAFOLD CREATOR IS BIGGEST TALENT-WAR COUNTER-MOVE
JUMPER IS THIRD SENIOR DEEPMIND EXIT IN THREE MONTHS — LANDS A DAY AFTER GEMINI CO-LEAD SHAZEER LEFT FOR OPENAI
TRUMP ON AXIOS: ANTHROPIC A THREAT 'A WEEK AGO MAYBE' — NAMES A 'PART OWNER' (READ: AMAZON) AS THE ONE THAT TURNED THEM IN
FABLE 5 AND MYTHOS STILL DARK INTO JUNE 22/23 SUBSCRIPTION CLIFF — NO COMMERCE LIFT, NO ANTHROPIC RE-RELEASE
GPT-5.6 STAYS LEAK-ONLY — ONE BENCHMARK SHOWS FABLE 5 STILL BEATING SUSPECTED 5.6 ON CORE GEOMETRY, ZERO OPENAI SIGNAL
